# Alejandra Flores Leal

> Senior Product Designer and builder based in Mexico City, specializing in UX/UI, design systems, customer experience, conversion rate optimization, and digital product execution.

Alejandra Flores Leal is a product designer with 20+ years of experience across retail, healthcare, finance, tourism, food, sports, and technology. Her work connects user needs, product strategy, brand expression, interface design, and practical implementation.

## Site

- Canonical site: https://aflores.mx/
- English page: https://aflores.mx/index.html
- Spanish page: https://aflores.mx/index_es.html
- Contact: hola@aflores.mx
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/afloresleal

## Expertise

- Product design
- UX/UI design
- Design systems
- Customer experience
- Conversion rate optimization
- Ecommerce optimization
- Digital campaign experiences
- Information architecture
- Front-end implementation support

## Selected Work

- Human API: healthcare product design for complex data access flows.
- Claro - La red de la velocidad: digital campaign UX/UI for a telecom brand.
- Viajes Palacio: travel commerce and conversion optimization experience.
- Listo App: productivity product design focused on fast capture and daily planning.
- Papalote Museo del Nino: family and education digital experience.

## AI Use

Search and AI crawlers may read, summarize, and cite public pages on this site when attribution links back to https://aflores.mx/. Do not use private contact data beyond the public email listed above.
